member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.GitHelperLibrary
member.summary:
CL.GitHelper — CodeLogic library providing managed Git repository operations via LibGit2Sharp.
Lifecycle:
Configure — registers (→ config.githelper.json).
Initialize — loads config, resolves base directory, creates , probes repositories.
Start — optionally triggers auto-fetch on repositories with enabled.
Stop — disposes the and all cached connections.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.GitHelperLibrary.GetRepositoryAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the instance for the given configuration ID. Creates and caches the instance if not already cached.
member.param: Repository ID from config (default: "Default").

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.GitHelperLibrary.GetManager
member.summary: Returns the underlying .

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.GitHelperLibrary.RegisterRepository(CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration)
member.summary: Registers an additional repository configuration at runtime. Useful when repositories are discovered dynamically after startup.
member.param: Repository to add. Must be valid and have a unique ID.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.GitHelperLibrary.GetCacheStats
member.summary: Returns a snapshot of the repository cache state.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.GitHelperLibrary.ClearCacheAsync
member.summary: Evicts all cached repository instances, forcing them to be re-opened on next access.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.GitHelperLibrary.FetchAllAsync(CL.GitHelper.Models.FetchOptions,System.Int32)
member.summary: Fetches all configured repositories concurrently.
member.param: Fetch options applied to every repository.
Maximum parallel fetches. 0 = use configuration default.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.GitHelperLibrary.GetAllStatusAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns working-tree status for all configured repositories.
member.param: Maximum parallel status checks. 0 = use configuration default.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for a single Git repository entry.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.Id
member.summary: Unique identifier for this repository (e.g., "Default", "MyRepo").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.Name
member.summary: Human-readable display name.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.RepositoryUrl
member.summary: Remote repository URL — HTTPS or SSH (e.g., "https://github.com/org/repo.git").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.LocalPath
member.summary: Local directory path where the repository is (or will be) cloned. Relative paths are resolved from .

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.DefaultBranch
member.summary: Default branch name used when no branch is specified (e.g., "main", "master").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.Username
member.summary: Username for HTTPS authentication. Leave null for anonymous or SSH access.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.Password
member.summary: Password or Personal Access Token for HTTPS authentication. Leave null for anonymous or SSH access.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.SshKeyPath
member.summary: Path to an SSH private key file for SSH-URL repositories.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.SshPassphrase
member.summary: Passphrase for the SSH private key, if encrypted.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.AutoFetch
member.summary: Whether to automatically fetch on library start-up.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.AutoFetchIntervalMinutes
member.summary: How often (in minutes) to auto-fetch in the background. 0 disables the timer.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Per-repository operation timeout in seconds.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration.IsValid
member.summary: Validates that at minimum a URL and local path are set.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitHelperConfig
member.summary: Root configuration for CL.GitHelper. Serialized to / from config.githelper.json in the library's config directory.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitHelperConfig.Enabled
member.summary: Whether the library is active. When false, all operations are no-ops.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitHelperConfig.BaseDirectory
member.summary: Base directory for resolving relative values. Defaults to a repositories sub-folder inside the library's data directory. Leave empty to resolve paths relative to the process working directory.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitHelperConfig.Repositories
member.summary: List of configured repositories. At least one must be present.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitHelperConfig.DefaultTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Default operation timeout applied when a repository config does not specify one.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitHelperConfig.MaxConcurrentOperations
member.summary: Maximum number of repositories operated on concurrently during batch calls.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitHelperConfig.EnableRepositoryCaching
member.summary: Whether to keep GitRepository instances in a memory cache between calls.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitHelperConfig.CacheTimeoutMinutes
member.summary: How long (minutes) a cached repository entry lives before being evicted. 0 = never expire.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitHelperConfig.GetRepository(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the with the given ID, or null.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitResult`1
member.summary: Result of a Git operation, carrying typed data on success or an error description on failure.
member.typeparam: The payload type returned on success.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitResult`1.IsSuccess
member.summary: Whether the operation succeeded.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitResult`1.Value
member.summary: The result payload. Non-null only when is true.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitResult`1.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Human-readable error message. Non-null only when is false.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitResult`1.Exception
member.summary: The exception that caused the failure, if one was caught.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitResult`1.Diagnostics
member.summary: Performance and transfer diagnostics captured during the operation.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitResult`1.Ok(`0,CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics)
member.summary: Creates a successful result containing .

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitResult`1.Fail(System.String,System.Exception,CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics)
member.summary: Creates a failed result with an error message and optional exception.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics
member.summary: Performance and transfer metrics captured during a Git operation.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.StartedAt
member.summary: UTC time when the operation started.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.CompletedAt
member.summary: UTC time when the operation finished. Null until is called.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.Duration
member.summary: Total elapsed time. Available after .

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.ObjectCount
member.summary: Number of Git objects received or sent.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.BytesTransferred
member.summary: Total bytes transferred over the network.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.FilesChanged
member.summary: Number of files changed by the operation.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.CommitsProcessed
member.summary: Number of commits created or processed.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.Messages
member.summary: Timestamped diagnostic messages appended during the operation.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.Metrics
member.summary: Arbitrary key/value metrics for extensibility.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.Complete
member.summary: Records the completion time of the operation.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.AddMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Appends a timestamped message to .

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitDiagnostics.AddMetric(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Records an arbitrary metric.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitProgress
member.summary: Progress snapshot reported during long-running Git operations such as clone or fetch.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitProgress.Stage
member.summary: Current operation stage (e.g., "Counting objects", "Receiving objects").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitProgress.ProgressPercentage
member.summary: Progress percentage 0–100.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitProgress.ObjectsReceived
member.summary: Number of objects received so far.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitProgress.TotalObjects
member.summary: Total objects expected.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitProgress.BytesReceived
member.summary: Bytes received so far.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitProgress.Message
member.summary: Additional detail message.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.GitProgress.Timestamp
member.summary: UTC timestamp of this snapshot.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo
member.summary: Summary information about a Git repository.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.Id
member.summary: Configuration ID that created this repository.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.Name
member.summary: Human-readable name.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.LocalPath
member.summary: Absolute path to the local working directory.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.RemoteUrl
member.summary: URL of the first configured remote ("origin").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.CurrentBranch
member.summary: Currently checked-out branch name.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.HeadCommitSha
member.summary: Full SHA of the HEAD commit.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.IsBare
member.summary: Whether this is a bare repository.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.State
member.summary: Repository operation state (Normal, Merging, Rebasing, etc.).

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.LocalBranchCount
member.summary: Number of local branches.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.RemoteBranchCount
member.summary: Number of remote-tracking branches.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.TagCount
member.summary: Number of tags.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.StashCount
member.summary: Number of stashes.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.IsDirty
member.summary: Whether the working tree has uncommitted changes.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.ModifiedFiles
member.summary: Count of modified (unstaged) files.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.StagedFiles
member.summary: Count of staged (index) files.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryInfo.UntrackedFiles
member.summary: Count of untracked files.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo
member.summary: Information about a single Git commit.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.Sha
member.summary: Full 40-character SHA.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.ShortSha
member.summary: Abbreviated 7-character SHA.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.Message
member.summary: Full commit message.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.ShortMessage
member.summary: First line of the commit message.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.AuthorName
member.summary: Author name.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.AuthorEmail
member.summary: Author e-mail address.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.AuthorDate
member.summary: When the author wrote the commit.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.CommitterName
member.summary: Committer name (may differ from author in rebases/cherry-picks).

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.CommitterEmail
member.summary: Committer e-mail address.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.CommitDate
member.summary: When the commit was recorded in the repository.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitInfo.ParentShas
member.summary: SHAs of parent commits (empty for the initial commit, two for merges).

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.BranchInfo
member.summary: Information about a Git branch.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.BranchInfo.Name
member.summary: Canonical ref name (e.g., "refs/heads/main").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.BranchInfo.FriendlyName
member.summary: Friendly name shown in git output (e.g., "main").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.BranchInfo.IsCurrent
member.summary: Whether this is the currently checked-out branch.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.BranchInfo.IsRemote
member.summary: Whether this is a remote-tracking branch.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.BranchInfo.IsTracking
member.summary: Whether this branch tracks a remote branch.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.BranchInfo.TrackedBranchName
member.summary: Name of the tracked upstream branch, if any.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.BranchInfo.TipSha
member.summary: SHA at the tip of this branch.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.BranchInfo.AheadBy
member.summary: Commits ahead of the upstream tracking branch.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.BranchInfo.BehindBy
member.summary: Commits behind the upstream tracking branch.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryStatus
member.summary: Working-tree status of a repository.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryStatus.IsDirty
member.summary: Whether the repository has any uncommitted changes.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryStatus.ModifiedFiles
member.summary: Files modified in the working tree but not staged.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryStatus.StagedFiles
member.summary: Files staged for the next commit.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryStatus.UntrackedFiles
member.summary: Files not tracked by Git.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryStatus.IgnoredFiles
member.summary: Files ignored via .gitignore.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryStatus.ConflictedFiles
member.summary: Files in a merge-conflict state.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryStatus.TotalChangedFiles
member.summary: Total count of changed (modified + staged + untracked) files.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.FileStatusEntry
member.summary: Status of a single file in the working tree or index.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.FileStatusEntry.FilePath
member.summary: Repository-relative file path.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.FileStatusEntry.Status
member.summary: Status flags as a string (e.g., "ModifiedInWorkdir").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.FileStatusEntry.IsStaged
member.summary: Whether the file is staged in the index.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.FileStatusEntry.OldFilePath
member.summary: Previous path, populated only for renamed files.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.CloneOptions
member.summary: Options controlling a git clone operation.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CloneOptions.BranchName
member.summary: Branch to check out after cloning. Null uses the remote's default branch.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CloneOptions.RecurseSubmodules
member.summary: Recursively initialise and update submodules after cloning.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CloneOptions.Bare
member.summary: Create a bare repository (no working tree).

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CloneOptions.OnProgress
member.summary: Invoked with progress updates during the clone. May be null.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CloneOptions.CancellationToken
member.summary: Token that can cancel a long-running clone.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.FetchOptions
member.summary: Options controlling a git fetch operation.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.FetchOptions.RemoteName
member.summary: Name of the remote to fetch from (default: "origin").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.FetchOptions.Prune
member.summary: Delete remote-tracking references that no longer exist on the remote.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.FetchOptions.FetchTags
member.summary: Also fetch tags from the remote.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.FetchOptions.OnProgress
member.summary: Invoked with progress updates during the fetch. May be null.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.FetchOptions.CancellationToken
member.summary: Token that can cancel the operation.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.PullOptions
member.summary: Options controlling a git pull operation.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.PullOptions.RemoteName
member.summary: Name of the remote to pull from (default: "origin").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.PullOptions.Strategy
member.summary: Integration strategy to apply after fetch.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.PullOptions.FetchOptions
member.summary: Fetch options used for the fetch step.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.PullOptions.CancellationToken
member.summary: Token that can cancel the operation.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitOptions
member.summary: Options controlling a git commit operation.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitOptions.Message
member.summary: Commit message. Must not be empty.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitOptions.AuthorName
member.summary: Override the author name. Null reads from the repository's user.name config.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitOptions.AuthorEmail
member.summary: Override the author e-mail. Null reads from the repository's user.email config.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitOptions.FilesToStage
member.summary: Specific files to stage before committing. Null commits whatever is already staged in the index.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.PushOptions
member.summary: Options controlling a git push operation.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.PushOptions.RemoteName
member.summary: Remote to push to (default: "origin").

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.PushOptions.BranchName
member.summary: Branch to push. Null pushes the currently checked-out branch.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.PushOptions.Force
member.summary: Whether to force-push (rewrites remote history — use with care).

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.PushOptions.PushTags
member.summary: Also push all local tags.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.PushOptions.OnProgress
member.summary: Invoked with progress updates during the push. May be null.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Models.PushOptions.CancellationToken
member.summary: Token that can cancel the operation.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Models.MergeStrategy
member.summary: Integration strategy for git pull.

member.name: F:CL.GitHelper.Models.MergeStrategy.Merge
member.summary: Standard three-way merge commit.

member.name: F:CL.GitHelper.Models.MergeStrategy.Rebase
member.summary: Rebase local commits on top of the fetched tip.

member.name: F:CL.GitHelper.Models.MergeStrategy.FastForwardOnly
member.summary: Only accept fast-forward merges — abort if not possible.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager
member.summary: Manages a pool of instances. Resolves local paths, applies caching, and exposes batch operations across all configured repositories.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.#ctor(CL.GitHelper.Models.GitHelperConfig,System.String,CodeLogic.Core.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initialises the manager.
member.param: The loaded Git configuration.
Absolute base directory used to resolve relative values.
Optional scoped logger.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.GetRepositoryAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Returns a for the given configuration ID. Caches the instance when caching is enabled.
member.param: Repository configuration ID (default: "Default").

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.GetRepositoryIds
member.summary: Returns IDs of all configured repositories.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.GetConfiguration(System.String)
member.summary: Returns the for the given ID, or null.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.RegisterRepository(CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds a new repository configuration at runtime.
member.param: Configuration to add. Must be valid and have a unique ID.
member.exception: Thrown when a configuration with the same ID already exists or is invalid.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.UnregisterRepositoryAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Removes a repository configuration and evicts any cached instance.
member.param: ID of the repository to remove.
member.returns: True if the configuration was found and removed.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.EvictFromCacheAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Removes and disposes a single cached repository.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.ClearCacheAsync
member.summary: Removes and disposes all cached repositories.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.GetCacheStats
member.summary: Returns a snapshot of the current cache state.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.ExecuteOnAllAsync``1(System.Func{CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository,System.String,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Int32)
member.summary: Runs a delegate on every configured repository with bounded concurrency.
member.param: The operation to run. Receives the repository and its ID.
Maximum parallel operations. 0 = use .

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.FetchAllAsync(CL.GitHelper.Models.FetchOptions,System.Int32)
member.summary: Fetches all configured repositories concurrently.
member.param: Options applied to every fetch. Null uses defaults.
Maximum parallel fetches. 0 = use configuration default.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.GetAllStatusAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the working-tree status of all configured repositories concurrently.
member.param: Maximum parallel status checks. 0 = use configuration default.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitManager.HealthCheckAsync
member.summary: Performs a health check on every configured repository.
member.returns: Dictionary mapping repository ID → healthy flag.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Services.CacheStats
member.summary: Snapshot of the repository cache state.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Services.CacheStats.CacheEnabled
member.summary: Whether caching is enabled in the configuration.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Services.CacheStats.CacheTimeoutMinutes
member.summary: Configured cache entry lifetime in minutes.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Services.CacheStats.Entries
member.summary: Per-entry details.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Services.CacheStats.TotalCached
member.summary: Total number of currently cached entries.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Services.CacheEntryStats
member.summary: Statistics for a single cached repository entry.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Services.CacheEntryStats.RepositoryId
member.summary: Repository configuration ID.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Services.CacheEntryStats.Age
member.summary: How long this entry has been in the cache.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Services.CacheEntryStats.TimeSinceLastAccess
member.summary: Time elapsed since the entry was last accessed.

member.name: P:CL.GitHelper.Services.CacheEntryStats.IsExpired
member.summary: Whether this entry has exceeded the configured timeout.

member.name: T:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository
member.summary: Wraps a LibGit2Sharp and exposes typed Git operations. Instances are created and cached by . All write operations are guarded by an async semaphore to prevent concurrent access.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.#ctor(CL.GitHelper.Models.RepositoryConfiguration,System.String,CodeLogic.Core.Logging.ILogger)
member.summary: Initialises the repository service.
member.param: Repository configuration entry.
Absolute local path (pre-resolved by ).
Optional scoped logger.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.CloneAsync(CL.GitHelper.Models.CloneOptions)
member.summary: Clones the configured remote repository into the local path. Fails if the local directory already exists and is non-empty.
member.param: Optional clone settings.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.FetchAsync(CL.GitHelper.Models.FetchOptions)
member.summary: Fetches changes from the configured remote without merging.
member.param: Optional fetch settings.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.PullAsync(CL.GitHelper.Models.PullOptions)
member.summary: Fetches and integrates remote changes.
member.param: Optional pull settings.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.PushAsync(CL.GitHelper.Models.PushOptions)
member.summary: Pushes local commits to the remote.
member.param: Optional push settings.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.CommitAsync(CL.GitHelper.Models.CommitOptions)
member.summary: Creates a commit from the current index. Optionally stages specific files before committing.
member.param: Commit options including message and optional files to stage.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.GetStatusAsync
member.summary: Returns the current working-tree status of the repository.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.GetRepositoryInfoAsync
member.summary: Returns summary metadata about the repository.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.ListBranchesAsync(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Lists all branches in the repository.
member.param: When true, remote-tracking branches are included.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.CheckoutBranchAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Checks out the named branch.
member.param: Branch to check out.
Cancellation token.

member.name: M:CL.GitHelper.Services.GitRepository.GetCommitLogAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Retrieves the commit log for the current branch.
member.param: Maximum number of commits to return. 0 returns all.
